evals.prompt: 請根據我們現在的 Nuxt UI repo，規劃 semantic tokens、app.config.ts ownership 和哪些樣式該升級到 global theme。
evals.expected_output: Should treat this as a design-system ownership task. It should reason about semantic tokens, promotion rules, and Nuxt UI mapping instead of only suggesting visual styles.
assertions: Treats the task as design-system ownership
Reasons about promotion or ownership rules
Maps the solution to Nuxt UI

evals.prompt: 這個 button 樣式到底該放 token、app.config.ts、區塊層，還是 component local？幫我做判斷。
evals.expected_output: Should answer through the ownership model and explain why the style belongs at a specific layer. It should not answer with pure aesthetics or arbitrary preference.
assertions: Explains why the decision fits the repo pattern

evals.prompt: 我只想讓首頁看起來更帥，不想討論 token 和 ownership。
evals.expected_output: Should recognize the task is visual direction rather than design-system governance. It should route to frontend-skill instead of forcing the discussion into tokens and ownership.
assertions: Recognizes the task is visual direction
Does not force design-system governance onto a styling-only request
